series_metadata.series_description: Records pertaining to the children residing at the Ohio Veterans Children's Home, previously known as the Ohio Soldiers’ and Sailors’ Orphans Home. These records include education and residential information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 100 years from the birth date of the child residing at the home. Some files were digitized, yet the originals are still in paper format. The enrollment cards and the applications for admissions will be pulled out of the files and transferred to Greene County Library in Xenia, OH. ; Electronic: For the electronic format, retain for 100 years from the birth date of the child residing at the home., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
